name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]

## The problem

<!-- What's the concrete pain you're hitting today? "It would be nice if..." is fine, but "I can't ship X because..." is better. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you imagine it working, from the user's perspective. API sketches, config examples, and CLI snippets welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else you thought about. Helps reviewers understand the design space. -->

## Who this is for

<!-- e.g. "teams shipping RAG in fintech", "anyone on LlamaIndex with a reranker", "auditors reading the evidence report". -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to prior discussion, related issues, external references. -->
